subcodes.first_line: O servants of the divine ones! What an exalted station this is, and what a glorious rank! From the black pit's depths to the zenith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خدام بندگان الهی این چه منصب عظیم است و این چه جاه جلیل از چاه سیاه باوج
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @The Holy Spirit, @humility; meekness; lowliness
